shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form form.subscribe clearErrors stale name type per-event metadata subscription" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,190p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '560,620p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1235,1295p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1400,1440p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && git status --short && rg -n \"const \\{ name, type, \\.\\.\\.\" src || true && sed -n '1,200p' package.json"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-hook-form-ephemeral-subscription-metadata.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Keep subscription event metadata ephemeral

Subscription payloads may combine durable form state with transient "'`name` and `type` fields describing the event. Internal form-state snapshots must strip those fields before merging, while callbacks should still receive the original payload so metadata remains available for the event that triggered the notification.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'
